site.title: GoodNewsDaily

hero.title: Good News. Great Music. Real Laughs.
hero.subtitle: The antidote to doomscrolling. Positive stories from around the world, feel-good music, and humor that actually makes you smile.
news.title: Good News
news.subtitle: Positive, hopeful stories from around the world. Because the world is better than the headlines suggest.
music.title: World Music
music.subtitle: Songs from every corner of the planet that make you feel something. Press play and let the world surprise you.
comedy.title: Comedy & Humor
comedy.subtitle: Life is too short not to laugh. Meet great comedians and enjoy some of the best jokes ever told.
about.title: About GoodNewsDaily
about.text1: GoodNewsDaily is a free, ad-free platform dedicated to sharing positive stories, great music, and genuine humor from around the world.
about.text2: We believe that good news deserves as much attention as bad news. The world is full of people solving problems, creating beauty, and helping each other — their stories deserve to be told.
about.text3: No algorithms. No clickbait. No doom. Just good stuff, curated with care.
about.value1: Positivity First — We only share stories that inspire, inform, or make you smile.
about.value2: Global Perspective — Good news happens everywhere, not just in English-speaking countries.
about.value3: No Ads, No Tracking — Free forever, privacy-friendly, open to all.
about.value4: Real Stories — Everything we share is verified and sourced. No fake feel-good.

updates.mar2026.title: Site Launch
updates.mar2026.desc: GoodNewsDaily is live — positive news, feel-good music, and humor to brighten your day.
